_description: Three-argument chain showing reinstatement: a defeated attacker cannot sustain its attack. Unattacked evidencia_hidrica defeats estado_concesion, which reduces attack pressure on paramo_territorio, allowing it to recover above the 0.5 acceptability threshold.

_field_semantics.initial_weight: NLI engagement at τ construction time. Computed as max(p_E, p_C) from BETO logits (direction-neutral). This is w(aᵢ) in Definition 2.1 of [7], the h-categoriser seed (σ⁰). Range: [0,1].
_field_semantics.weight: VALUE_NET engagement score. Perplexity-attenuated BETO confidence. Passed to Haskell for provenance but NOT used by the current h-categoriser (Year 0). Future: drives Belnap fixed-point in cubun layer (Year 1). Range: [0,1].
_field_semantics.perplexity: BETO perplexity (λ_⊥) for this span. Measures model uncertainty. Used by attenuation gate: if λ_⊥ > corpus_max_perplexity, force σ*=0.0 and set attenuated=true. Higher perplexity = colonial epistemic exclusion. Range: [0, ∞).
_field_semantics.attacks: List of argument names this argument attacks (target names, not source names). Attack direction: this atom → target atoms.

_perplexity_values: Constructed for pedagogical demonstration (not empirical corpus spans). Values chosen to demonstrate range: low (4.2, concrete empirical claim) to moderate (7.1, institutional claim). All below attenuation threshold (21.769), so gate does not fire in this scenario.

evidencia_hidrica.rationale: Unattacked argument with positive initial weight converges to σ*=1.0 under h-categoriser (Definition 2.7 of [7]). No attack pressure → maximum acceptability degree.

estado_concesion.rationale: Attacked by evidencia_hidrica (σ*=1.0). Formula: σ(estado) = w(estado) / (w(estado) + σ(evidencia)) = 0.69 / (0.69 + 1.0) ≈ 0.408. Defeated.

paramo_territorio.rationale: Attacked by estado_concesion (σ*=0.408). Formula: σ(paramo) = 0.73 / (0.73 + 0.408) ≈ 0.641. Reinstatement: weakened attacker reduces pressure, allowing σ* > 0.5.
